messages.text: Quick decision needed: do we keep the enterprise tier at $25k/year or bump to $30k? Sales is asking.
Last quarter's churn data argues for $25k. We bumped before and saw 8% drop in renewals.
Good point. Let's lock enterprise at $25k for now. Revisit at end of Q2.
Decision recap: enterprise tier stays at $25k. Renewal discount remains 10% for two-year commitments.
